name: Abhishek Pandey
headline: Full Stack Developer building modern web experiences with the MEAN stack.
summary:
Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering scalable, high-performance solution across 
frontend and backend.Skilled in building distributed systems and APIs with NodeJS and 
ExpressJS,performant UI with Angular and TypeScript. Proficient at system design, cloud native 
architectures and driving the full software lifecycle from design to deployment and monitoring.
highlights: Full-Stack JavaScript Proficiency: Expert-level knowledge of JavaScript for both front-end and back-end.
API Development: Experience in designing and maintaining RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.
Database Management: Expertise in MongoDB, including creating collections, writing queries, and handling unstructured data.
Front-end Development: Building responsive and dynamic user interfaces with Angular.

experience.description:
Design and implement scalable REST APIs using Node.js and Express for enterprise automotive digital platforms. 
Integrate MuleSoft enterprise APIs and external services to enable vehicle-related features including dealer discovery, fuel locator, and smart parking services. 
Collaborate with frontend teams to integrate Angular applications with backend APIs, improving data flow across the system. 
Contribute to documentation and architecture knowledge sharing through Confluence.
Participate in maintaining high-availability backend services for large-scale automotive client platforms.

Developed scalable backend APIs using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB for multiple web applications. 
Built Angular frontend modules and integrated backend services for full-stack delivery. 
Implemented cross-platform push notification systems using Firebase for Android, iOS, and web clients. 
Designed and implemented a “Remember Device” (Trusted Device) authentication system to securely bypass OTP verification on recognized devices, improving login experience and reducing authentication friction. 
Designed multilingual questionnaire systems supporting international users. 
Integrated YouTube and Twitch APIs to create analytics dashboards tracking video performance metrics. 
Improved frontend stability by diagnosing and resolving UI issues across modules.

Built backend APIs using Node.js and Express for client applications. 
Integrated APIs with Angular-based web interfaces. 
Worked closely with frontend engineers to optimize data flows and resolve integration issues. 
Delivered multiple client-facing web application features.

Developed responsive frontend components using Angular, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. 
Integrated REST APIs to enable dynamic data-driven interfaces. 
Delivered solutions for government and enterprise clients in a startup environment.

projects.name: Maruti Suzuki Rewards
projects.description:
Enterprise web platform enabling digital services for automotive customers. 
Built and enhanced a scalable enterprise web platform for automotive customers, developing backend 
services using Node.js and Express, integrating MuleSoft APIs, and delivering key features like dealer 
service discovery, fuel locator, smart parking, and vehicle assistance modules..

projects.name: Polar Ace
projects.description:
Web application for monitoring video engagement metrics. 
Developed a web application to track and analyze video engagement metrics by building backend 
services integrating YouTube and Twitch APIs, implementing trusted device authentication to streamline 
logins, and enabling centralized dashboards for performance monitoring.

projects.name: Sema Dashboard
projects.description:
Feedback survey system with a 5-point rating mechanism to capture and manage user responses 
efficiently. 
Developed a feedback survey platform with a 5-point rating mechanism by designing secure RESTful 
APIs using Node.js, implementing authentication middleware for data protection, and integrating with an 
Angular frontend for seamless data interaction and dynamic rendering.

projects.name: Drip Irrigation System platform
projects.description:
Built a farmer-centric Drip Irrigation System platform delivering real-time insights on government 
agricultural policies and loan schemes to improve decision-making and accessibility. Implemented REST 
API integrations in Angular to enable dynamic data rendering and efficient frontend-backend 
communication. Optimized
